de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Interface PIOPathIterator

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IntIterator
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    PosInOccurrence.PIOPathIteratorImpl

    public interface PIOPathIterator
extends IntIterator
    This interface represents an iterator, iterating the nodes on the path between the root of a term and a position within the term, given by a PosInOccurrence-object

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getChild() 
      PosInOccurrence getPosInOccurrence() 
      Term getSubTerm() 
      int next() 

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.IntIterator

        hasNext

    • Method Detail

      • next

        int next()
        Specified by:
        next in interface IntIterator
        Returns:
        the number of the next child on the path, or -1 if no further child exists

      • getPosInOccurrence

        PosInOccurrence getPosInOccurrence()
        Returns:
        the current position within the term (i.e. corresponding to the latest next()-call)

      • getSubTerm

        Term getSubTerm()
        Returns:
        the current subterm this object points to (i.e. corresponding to the latest next()-call); this method satisfies getPosInOccurrence().subTerm()==getSubTerm()

      • getChild

        int getChild()
        Returns:
        the number of the next child on the path, or -1 if no further child exists (this is the number that was also returned by the last call of next())
